race.comment: CLASSIC TOUCH (7) improving filly who had a bit on her rivals at start four with a slick 3 len winner over 1400m at this track in the soft (7) going. Winkers go on from the sticky draw and shapes as the main danger. FULMINA'S LEGACY (8) just over three weeks between runs with a fading fifth over 1500m at Kembla Grange. Further improved for this and has the ability to take a hand in the finish. LANDMARK LADY (9) dropped in grade on the quick back-up with a plugging seventh over 1400m at Albury. Can sneak into the minor money in this average contest. I DOUBT IT (3) was below her best last time when sixth over 2140m at Goulburn. Can atone.
